2990540.title: World Stage: EMA Highlights 2020
2990540.description: The MTV EMAs 2020 were hosted by pop superstars, Little Mix and featured performances from Alicia Keys, DaBaby, Doja Cat, Sam Smith, David Guetta, Maluma and many more.
